bns:Component.name: HROpsConsole - Get Tasks
bns:Component.bns:description: Returns all open and completed tasks across ER cases for HR Ops Console

message.msgTxt: '{"tasks":[{"id":"T001","title":"Collect manager written statement","caseId":"C-2024-001","owner":"Mike Torres","due":"2024-03-05","done":false,"severity":"High","overdue":true},{"id":"T002","title":"Review attendance records from Workday","caseId":"C-2024-001","owner":"Sarah Reynolds","due":"2024-03-07","done":true,"severity":"Medium","overdue":false},{"id":"T003","title":"Coordinate return-to-work plan with manager","caseId":"C-2024-002","owner":"Amanda Foster","due":"2024-03-20","done":false,"severity":"Medium","overdue":false},{"id":"T004","title":"Audit payroll records for 6 months","caseId":"C-2024-003","owner":"Sarah Reynolds","due":"2024-03-05","done":false,"severity":"Critical","overdue":true},{"id":"T005","title":"Schedule Finance reconciliation meeting","caseId":"C-2024-003","owner":"Amanda Foster","due":"2024-03-07","done":false,"severity":"Critical","overdue":false},{"id":"T006","title":"Send escalation to manager James Wilson","caseId":"C-2024-004","owner":"Amanda Foster","due":"2024-03-05","done":false,"severity":"Medium","overdue":true},{"id":"T007","title":"Deactivate payroll record for E015","caseId":"C-2024-005","owner":"Payroll Team","due":"2024-03-02","done":false,"severity":"Critical","overdue":true},{"id":"T008","title":"Confirm benefits deprovisioning for E015","caseId":"C-2024-005","owner":"Amanda Foster","due":"2024-03-03","done":false,"severity":"High","overdue":true},{"id":"T009","title":"Draft PIP document with manager","caseId":"C-2024-006","owner":"Sarah Reynolds","due":"2024-03-08","done":false,"severity":"High","overdue":false},{"id":"T010","title":"Schedule weekly PIP check-ins","caseId":"C-2024-006","owner":"Mike Torres","due":"2024-03-10","done":false,"severity":"Medium","overdue":false}]}'
